title: PR3 3BT, United Petfood UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/RP3106PL/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: United Petfood UK Limited   Installation name: Skretting   Permit number: EPR/RP3106PL/V005   "
